title: citharexylum guatemalense
intro: Citharexylum guatemalense, also known as the Guatemalan fiddlewood, is a plant species that belongs to the Verbenaceae family and is native to the tropical regions of Central America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Citharexylum guatemalense include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from pain and inflammation, among others. Citharexylum guatemalense can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
